} @for (error of activeErrors; track error) {

} @if (successMessage) {
{{ successMessage }}
}

{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.WALK_IN_TITLE' | translate }}

@if (isWalkInDateRangeInvalid) {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.ERROR_INVALID_RETURN_DATE' | translate }}
} @if (submitError) {
{{ submitError }}
}
} @else {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_RESERVATIONS_FOUND' | translate }}
} } @else { @for (item of matchedReservations; track item.id) { }
{{ 'RESERVATION.CUSTOMER_PROFILE_NAME' | translate }} {{ 'RESERVATION.PICKUP_DATE' | translate }} {{ 'RESERVATION.PICKUP_TIME' | translate }} {{ 'RESERVATION.RETURN_DATE' | translate }} {{ 'RESERVATION.RESERVATION_STATUS' | translate }} {{ 'RESERVATION.EQUIPMENT_COUNT' | translate }}
{{ item.customerName }} {{ item.startDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }} {{ item.pickUpTime ? item.pickUpTime.substring(0, 5) : '' }} {{ item.endDate | date:'dd.MM.yyyy' }} @if (item.reservationStatus === ReservationStatus.CREATED) { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.CREATED' | translate }} } @if (item.reservationStatus === ReservationStatus.PICKED_UP) { {{ 'RESERVATION_STATUS.PICKED_UP' | translate }} } {{ item.items?.length || 0 }} {{ 'RESERVATION.ITEMS' | translate }}
{{ 'RESERVATION.SELECTED_EQUIPMENT' | translate }}:
@for (eq of item.items; track eq.id) {
@if (scannedEquipmentIds.includes(eq.id)) { ✓ } @else { }
{{ eq.model }} ({{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + eq.equipmentType | translate }})
@if (eq.barcodeId) { {{ eq.barcodeId }} } {{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + eq.targetSkillLevel | translate }}
} @empty {
{{ 'RESERVATION.NO_EQUIPMENT_SELECTED' | translate }}
}
}
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.SCANNED_LIST_TITLE' | translate }} ({{ scannedEquipments.length }})
@if (scannedEquipments.length === 0) {
{{ 'BARCODE_SCANNER.NO_EQUIPMENT_SCANNED' | translate }}
} @else { @for (item of scannedEquipments; track item.id) { } @if (scannedItemsTotalPrice > 0) { }

{{ item.model }} {{ 'EQUIPMENT_TYPE.' + item.equipmentType | translate }} {{ 'RENTAL_STATUS.' + item.status | translate }} {{ 'SKILL_LEVEL.' + item.targetSkillLevel | translate }} {{ item.price | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':(translateService.currentLang || 'de') }}
{{ 'RESERVATION.TOTAL_PRICE' | translate }} ({{ scanScenario === 'NO_RESERVATION' ? ('BARCODE_SCANNER.WALK_IN_TITLE' | translate) : ('RESERVATION.TITLE_OVERVIEW' | translate) }}): {{ scannedItemsTotalPrice | currency:'EUR':'symbol':'1.2-2':'de-AT' }}
}
@if (scanScenario === 'NO_RESERVATION' && scannedEquipments.length > 0) { } @if (scanScenario === 'SINGLE_RESERVATION' && equipmentScenario === 'ALL_RESERVED_EQUIPMENT_SCANNED') { @if (matchedReservations[0].reservationStatus === ReservationStatus.CREATED) { } @if (matchedReservations[0].reservationStatus === ReservationStatus.PICKED_UP) { } } @if (scanScenario === 'SINGLE_RESERVATION' && equipmentScenario === 'SOME_RESERVED_EQUIPMENT_SCANNED') { } @if (equipmentScenario === 'EQUIPMENT_SCANNED_THAT_IS_UNRESERVED') { } @if (scanScenario === 'CONFLICT_RESERVATION' && equipmentScenario !== 'EQUIPMENT_SCANNED_THAT_IS_UNRESERVED') { }
